creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
> Would it be useful to include that as an example in the makefs man page?

I think that's not a bad idea but it will get out of sync with the release scripts I'm sure. Brainstorming, could we have a default ZFS config in whatever format, and a tool/script/documentation for using that with either makefs or zfs tools? Also for use by a hypothetical cloud/bare metal provisioning tool?
